name: OBI-1 > 0.75 (Horizon 5)
hypothesis: Tightening the threshold on the high-performing OBI signal (iter001_obi1_gt_05_h5, WR 92.8%) from 0.5 to 0.75 will isolate a subset of even higher-conviction signals. This should further increase the win rate and expectancy, confirming a strong dose-response relationship, at the cost of reduced trade frequency.
mutation_note: Per feedback analyst recommendation and improvement proposal to 'tighten_threshold', increased threshold from 0.5 to 0.75 to test for a higher-conviction subset.
